ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender identification of the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Detailed status of the customer */,
  "is_new_customer" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is new */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last activity */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the customer was added to the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the orders table */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the products table */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the marketing campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the customers table */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marketing campaigns table */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of customer interaction (e.g., login, purchase, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
